list.name: Changes
list.comment: 1. Initialized the InkOrPixel project repository and created a Python virtual environment (`.venv`). 2. Added a README.md describing the goal of the project (classifying traditional vs digital artwork using CNNs). 3. Created a requirements.txt file to manage project dependencies. 4. Implemented core project scripts: `main.py`, `train.py`, `evaluate.py`, `dataset.py`, `model.py`, and `config.py`. 5. Set up a clean project directory structure including `data/`, `outputs/`, `notebooks/`, and `assets/`. 6. Organized data folders into **raw and processed datasets. 7. Refactored the codebase into a `src/` module structure to improve organization and scalability. 8. Updated the README with a project structure section** documenting the repository layout. 9. Added a .gitignore file to exclude the virtual environment and unnecessary files from version control. 10. Verified that the project runs successfully through the main execution script.

task.summary: Initial commit: set up base project structure
Initial commit: set up base project structure
Made an alteration to the README file.

1. Initialized the InkOrPixel project repository and created a Python virtual environment (`.venv`). 2. Added a README.md describing the goal of the project (classifying traditional vs digital artwork using CNNs). 3. Created a requirements.txt file to manage project dependencies. 4. Implemented core project scripts: `main.py`, `train.py`, `evaluate.py`, `dataset.py`, `model.py`, and `config.py`. 5. Set up a clean project directory structure including `data/`, `outputs/`, `notebooks/`, and `assets/`. 6. Organized data folders into **raw and processed datasets. 7. Refactored the codebase into a `src/` module structure to improve organization and scalability. 8. Updated the README with a project structure section** documenting the repository layout. 9. Added a .gitignore file to exclude the virtual environment and unnecessary files from version control. 10. Verified that the project runs successfully through the main execution script.

MESSAGE.value: Initial commit: set up base project structure
Made an alteration to the README file.

1. Initialized the InkOrPixel project repository and created a Python virtual environment (`.venv`). 2. Added a README.md describing the goal of the project (classifying traditional vs digital artwork using CNNs). 3. Created a requirements.txt file to manage project dependencies. 4. Implemented core project scripts: `main.py`, `train.py`, `evaluate.py`, `dataset.py`, `model.py`, and `config.py`. 5. Set up a clean project directory structure including `data/`, `outputs/`, `notebooks/`, and `assets/`. 6. Organized data folders into **raw and processed datasets. 7. Refactored the codebase into a `src/` module structure to improve organization and scalability. 8. Updated the README with a project structure section** documenting the repository layout. 9. Added a .gitignore file to exclude the virtual environment and unnecessary files from version control. 10. Verified that the project runs successfully through the main execution script.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: 1. Initialized the InkOrPixel project repository and created a Python virtual environment (`.venv`). 2. Added a README.md describing the goal of the project (classifying traditional vs digital artwork using CNNs). 3. Created a requirements.txt file to manage project dependencies. 4. Implemented core project scripts: `main.py`, `train.py`, `evaluate.py`, `dataset.py`, `model.py`, and `config.py`. 5. Set up a clean project directory structure including `data/`, `outputs/`, `notebooks/`, and `assets/`. 6. Organized data folders into **raw and processed datasets. 7. Refactored the codebase into a `src/` module structure to improve organization and scalability. 8. Updated the README with a project structure section** documenting the repository layout. 9. Added a .gitignore file to exclude the virtual environment and unnecessary files from version control. 10. Verified that the project runs successfully through the main execution script.
